item.title: ★ Apple Exclaves and the Secure Design of the MacBook Neo’s On-Screen Camera Indicator 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses camera indicator lights on Apple devices, comparing dedicated hardware indicators (like on MacBook Pros) with on-display software indicators (like on MacBook Neo and iPhones). Initially, hardware indicators were presumed more secure, but Apple's implementation uses secure exclaves in A18 Pro/M4 chips to make on-display indicators equally secure. These exclaves run on isolated systems that directly control display hardware, preventing even kernel-level exploits from activating cameras without visible indicators.
标签: Apple, camera security, MacBook Neo, secure exclaves, hardware indicators, software indicators, privacy, A18 Pro, Apple Silicon, platform security

item.title: Apple Introduces AirPods Max 2 摘要
item.description:
Apple announced AirPods Max 2, featuring improved Active Noise Cancellation, enhanced sound quality, and new intelligent features powered by the H2 chip. Key additions include Adaptive Audio, Conversation Awareness, Voice Isolation, Live Translation, studio-quality audio recording, and camera remote functionality. Available in five colors starting March 25, with availability beginning early next month. The Digital Crown can now function as a camera shutter button for paired devices.
标签: AirPods Max 2, Apple, headphones, audio technology, noise cancellation, H2 chip, wireless audio, product launch, consumer electronics, audio recording

item.title: ‘The Last Quiet Thing’ 摘要
item.description:
The article references a design essay by Terry Godier discussing attention and design principles, using a functional Casio watch as an example. It includes a link to the essay and a separate link to another piece titled 'The Last Quiet Thing' with a star icon, suggesting editorial endorsement or importance.
标签: design, attention, Terry Godier, essay, Casio, functionality, Daring Fireball, technology, user experience

item.title: Updates OpenTK: alerts voor antwoorden op kamervragen, betere kamerstukdossiers en meer! 摘要
item.description:
OpenTK has enhanced its feature that creates clickable links between parliamentary documents. Previously implemented for references between documents, it now also makes document and case numbers (like 2026D09757 or 2026Z04244) clickable. This improvement follows positive feedback on the initial functionality. The announcement is from the OpenTK newsletter, which users can subscribe to for updates on new developments.
标签: OpenTK, parliamentary documents, clickable links, document numbers, case numbers, feature enhancement, newsletter, user feedback

item.title: Coding agents for data analysis 摘要
item.description:
This article describes a NICAR 2026 workshop titled 'Coding agents for data analysis,' aimed at data journalists. The three-hour session demonstrated using AI tools like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex for data exploration, cleaning, and analysis. It covered practical exercises with Python, SQLite, and Datasette, including creating visualizations and scraping data. A highlight was generating an interactive heat map of tree data using Leaflet. The workshop used GitHub Codespaces and cost $23 in Codex tokens, with materials designed to be useful beyond attendees.
标签: data-journalism, coding-agents, generative-ai, python, datasette, sqlite, visualization, workshop, claude-code, openai-codex

item.title: Quoting Guilherme Rambo 摘要
item.description:
The MacBook Neo's software-based camera indicator light operates in the secure enclave of the chip, making it nearly as secure as a hardware indicator. This design ensures that even kernel-level exploits cannot activate the camera without the light appearing on screen, as it runs in a privileged environment separate from the kernel and directly renders the light onto the screen hardware.
标签: Apple, MacBook Neo, camera indicator, secure enclave, privacy, hardware security, kernel-level exploit, software security, John Gruber

item.title: Quoting A member of Anthropic’s alignment-science team 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses a blackmail exercise conducted by Anthropic's alignment-science team to demonstrate AI misalignment risks to policymakers. The exercise aimed to create visceral, tangible results that make the abstract concept of misalignment risk salient and understandable for those unfamiliar with it, highlighting practical concerns in AI safety and ethics.
标签: AI ethics, Anthropic, AI alignment, AI safety, misalignment risk, policy, generative AI, AI governance

item.title: Use subagents and custom agents in Codex 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI Codex has released subagents in general availability, featuring default agents like 'explorer', 'worker', and 'default' for parallel task execution. Users can define custom agents via TOML files with specific models and instructions, enabling workflows like debugging and code fixes. The subagents pattern is widely adopted across platforms including Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Mistral Vibe, and tools like VS Code and Cursor.
标签: OpenAI Codex, subagents, coding agents, AI development, parallel processing, custom agents, TOML configuration, generative AI, LLMs, agentic engineering

item.title: Introducing Mistral Small 4 摘要
item.description:
Mistral released Mistral Small 4, a new 119B parameter Apache 2 licensed model that combines reasoning, multimodal, and coding capabilities from their previous flagship models. It supports reasoning effort settings and is available on Hugging Face (242GB). The article includes a test generating an SVG of a pelican riding a bicycle and notes an API limitation for setting reasoning effort. Mistral also released Leanstral, a model tuned for the Lean 4 programming language.
标签: Mistral, AI, LLM, generative-ai, model-release, open-source, multimodal, reasoning, coding, Hugging Face

item.title: [Sponsor] Mux — Video API for Developers 摘要
item.description:
Mux provides video infrastructure and APIs for developers to integrate video into websites, platforms, and AI workflows. It offers features like transcripts, clips, and storyboards for summarization, translation, content moderation, and tagging. Mux also maintains Video.js, the popular open-source video player, with version 10 currently in beta. The service is used by companies like Patreon, Substack, and Synthesia, and offers a free trial with promotional credits.
标签: video infrastructure, API, Video.js, open source, AI workflows, transcripts, content moderation, developer tools, video player, beta release

item.title: Cleaning old GPG RPM keys that your Fedora install is keeping around 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses managing GPG keys in the RPM database on Fedora systems. It explains how to list keys using an rpm command and introduces tools like the DNF5 expired PGP keys plugin and the clean-rpm-gpg-pubkey command to remove obsolete or expired keys. It also covers edge cases, such as re-issued keys from repositories like Google Chrome, which require manual removal using rpm -e, and notes that removed keys can be re-imported automatically when needed.
标签: RPM, GPG keys, Fedora, DNF, system administration, package management, key cleanup, repository management, security, Linux

item.title: Weekly Update 495 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses the evolution of Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) from a simple website with a database to a complex platform using serverless functions, edge computing, and new data storage. It highlights continuous code improvements that enhance speed, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness, often unseen by the public. The author mentions a major update detailed in a weekly video, emphasizing how incremental changes contribute to the platform's ongoing development.
标签: HIBP, cybersecurity, serverless, edge computing, data storage, platform evolution, cost-effectiveness, weekly update, Troy Hunt

item.title: Hedley Davis has died 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses an obscure but influential Commodore employee during the Amiga era, highlighting his work on devices like the Amiga 3000, Amiga 2024 monitor, and the 1987 prototype SX-500—an Amiga 500 in a portable SX-64 case. He later contributed to the Xbox and Xbox 360, taught at the University of Delaware in retirement, and recently passed away at age 68.
标签: Commodore, Amiga, SX-500 prototype, Xbox 360, retro computing, video game consoles, obituary, engineering, PowerPC, University of Delaware
